## Task

Describe the small modeling example or documentation improvement.

## Modeling Value

Explain how this improves reproducibility, assumptions, setup, expected output, or validation clarity.

## Suggested File

```text
examples/
notes/
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Units are stated.
- [ ] Required MATLAB products are listed if applicable.
- [ ] Expected output is described.
- [ ] The example remains small and inspectable.
